scripts.prepare: npm run clean && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.posttest: npm run lint && npm run test:types
scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const v=require('./package.json').version;const re=/cssfun@(v)?\d+\.\d+\.\d+(?:-[\w.-]+)?/g;const files=['README.md','docs/AGENTS.md','example/rasti/index.html','example/react/index.html','example/vanilla/index.html'];files.forEach(f=>{const t=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');fs.writeFileSync(f,t.replace(re,(m,p)=>'cssfun@'+(p||'')+v));});execSync('git add '+files.join(' '),{stdio:'inherit'});" && npm run version:changelog
scripts.version:changelog:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const v=require('./package.json').version;if(v.includes('-'))process.exit(0);if(!fs.existsSync('CHANGELOG.md'))process.exit(0);let c=fs.readFileSync('CHANGELOG.md','utf8');if(!/^## \[Unreleased\]\s*$/m.test(c))process.exit(0);const d=new Date();const date=d.getFullYear()+'-'+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const tag='v'+v;c=c.replace(/^## \[Unreleased\][ 	]*
+/m,'## [Unreleased]

## ['+v+'] - '+date+'

');const m=c.match(/^\[unreleased\]:\s*(\S+?)/compare/(\S+?)\.\.\.HEAD\s*$/im);if(m)c=c.replace(/^\[unreleased\]:.*$/im,'[unreleased]: '+m[1]+'/compare/'+tag+'...HEAD
['+v+']: '+m[1]+'/compare/'+m[2]+'...'+tag);fs.writeFileSync('CHANGELOG.md',c);execSync('git add CHANGELOG.md',{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.docs:api: jsdoc2md --module-index-format none --helper jsdoc2md/helper.cjs --partial jsdoc2md/header.hbs --partial jsdoc2md/sig-link.hbs --partial jsdoc2md/sig-link-html.hbs --partial jsdoc2md/sig-link-parent.hbs --files src/*.js > docs/api.md
